name: kyototycoon
explanation: Kyoto Tycoon serves an HTTP RPC interface; the check issues a single GET against the canonical `/rpc/report` endpoint on the well-known port 1978 and parses its tab-separated response. No authentication is required. The shipped auto_conf.yaml already templates `http://%%host%%:1978/rpc/report`, confirming a single canonical URL. Pattern B (single canonical HTTP path).
notes: The optional `name` field is a freeform instance label, not a discovery input.
